title: SP.9 Anti-Infantry Artillery Vehicle
content:
{{Top|canon=SP.9}} {{RepulsorliftVehicle |image=[[File:SP9_anti_infantry.jpg]] |name=SP.9 Anti-Infantry Artillery Vehicle |designer= |manufacturer=[[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' |line= |model= |type=Modified anti-[[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] battery''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'' |cost=20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] {{C|used}} |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |speed=60 [[Kilometer/Legends|km]][[Standard hour/Legends|h]] |max alt= |maneuverability= |engine= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=2 [[DF.9 laser cannon]]s''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=1; 3 [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]] |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=Long range anti-infantry support |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|So, what's being stored in Zila?''"
"''Weapons systems.''"
"''What do you mean? Like SP.9s?''"
"''Think big, Haslip. We're not just talking anti-infantry here.|[[Dair Haslip]] and [[Nilo (Imperial)|Nilo]]|{{JournalCite|3|Mission to Zila}}}} The '''SP.9 Anti-Infantry Artillery Vehicle''' was a self-propelled [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] piece manufactured by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]. ==Characteristics== Manufactured by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]], the SP.9 Anti-Infantry Artillery Vehicle was a self-propelled [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] piece that incorporated twin, fast-firing [[DF.9 laser cannon]]s based on [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation's]] [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blaster]], mounted on a turret with a hundred and eighty degree firing arc. The guns were fed from a light [[ion unit]] that had been specially designed for use with the SP.9; The ion unit also powered the [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] chassis, which was armored with a one-inch thick hull. The internal power unit could supply the twin guns with virtually unlimited ammunition. The SP.9 had an open turret, which caused it to have a vulnerability in close combat. The unit was also awkward to maintain, as to access the engine, the entire turret had to be removed. Despite these deficiencies, the SP.9 boasted the lowest mechanical failure rate of any self-propelled gun in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service. ==History== The SP.9 was designed to assist in the suppression of indigenous populations on low-technology [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] units were issued the SP.9 as standard. While the SP.9 was designed to act as a long range anti-infantry platform, it was found that the weapon was effective against medium armored vehicles in the field, and even some heavily armored craft. The SP.9 was not commonly used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces due to the amount of cargo space the weapon took up, but it performed effectively when deployed. A variant design, based on the [[Twin DF.9/Legends|Twin DF.9]], was the [[Twin SP.9]].[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|3|Mission to Zila|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Kit]]'' *[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' *''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'' *{{FactFile|89|ANT 3-4|Golan Arms DF.9 Anti Infantry Battery}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' *{{DB|technology|antiinfantrybattery|anti-infantry laser battery}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Golan Arms products]] [[Category:Hovertank models]] [[Category:Mobile artillery types]] [[Category:Vehicle classes of the Galactic Empire]]
